description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, angular roof and a combination of concrete and wood paneling on its exterior. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor patio and pool area. The property includes a spacious patio with outdoor seating, a rectangular swimming pool, and two wooden outbuildings, likely serving as a garage and storage or guest rooms. The rear of the bungalow is more private, with smaller windows and a driveway leading to the garage. The landscaping is minimal, with a raised green lawn surrounding the house and hardscaped areas for outdoor living. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wood paneling, a patio, pool, and two wooden outbuildings, set on a raised green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, patio seating, pool, and both wooden outbuildings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the driveway, garage, and smaller windows, with the pool visible to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the main entrance, garage, and the angular roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a more private facade with minimal windows and the pool area in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and smaller side and rear windows
